title: The Palm Beach Girl
writer: H.M. Harwood, Byron Morgan, Forrest Halsey
actors: Bebe Daniels, Lawrence Gray, Marguerite Clayton
plot: Emily Bennett, arriving in Palm Beach on a train, puts her head out of the window and her face is smudged black from the locomotive's coal smoke. She is mistaken for a black girl and this does oh so embarrass her two aunts who are...
